inventory.title: Personal Component Inventory
inventory.empty: Your inventory is empty. Add a component first.
inventory.quantityInvalid: Quantity must be a non-negative integer.
part.lcscPrompt: Enter an LCSC part number, for example C25804
part.notFound: No component was found for ${1} in the JLCEDA library.
common.failed: Could not copy to Favorites or the personal library. The inventory record was kept.
import.title: Import order file
import.noRows: The file contains no component rows that can be imported.
import.summary: ${1} component rows were recognized. Continue importing?
import.defaultStatus: Default status when the status column is missing
import.error: Could not parse the order file: ${1}
recommend.prompt: Enter a C number, manufacturer part number, or name; leave blank to show all available stock
recommend.empty: No matching inventory components were found.
recommend.title: Inventory-first recommendations
place.title: Place from inventory
place.empty: There are no catalog-backed in-stock components to place. Manual and depleted records are hidden.
place.ready: The component is attached to the pointer. Click the schematic canvas to place it. Inventory is not deducted automatically.
place.failed: The component could not be attached to the pointer.
about.title: About Personal Component Inventory
about.content:
Version ${1}
Data storage: JLCEDA extension user configuration
Target platform: Professional V3

This extension does not require a custom server. Official documentation does not guarantee cross-computer synchronization, capacity, or conflict handling for extension user configuration. Verify with the same account on two devices before release.
error.storageRead: Inventory data could not be read.
error.storageWrite: Inventory data could not be saved.
